author: opus
text:
participant: trait + git-remote reference impl

Land SPEC §5's Participant contract and reroute the claim path
through it via the bl-eae4 negotiation primitive. Plugin dispatch
in commands/lifecycle.rs is intentionally untouched — the legacy
shim is bl-b1dd's job, and rerouting here would force its design
ahead of the contract that should drive it.

GitRemoteParticipant::for_claim is the canonical impl: full
projection, Required policy on Claim, GitRemoteClaimProtocol per
event. Future events (review, close, sync) and richer projections
land in their own children of bl-b7fb.
